description: "Creates an event message."

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Creates an event message.

## Import

```ts
import { eventMessage } from "@graphrefly/ts/messaging";
```

## Signature

```ts
function eventMessage(
	type: string,
	payload: T,
	opts: EventMessageOptions,
): EventMessage<T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `type` | `string` | type value used by the helper. |
| `payload` | `T` | Payload to lower or wrap. |
| `opts` | `EventMessageOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

The event message result.

## Example

```ts
import { eventMessage } from "@graphrefly/ts/messaging";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/messaging/event-message.ts`
